titleStmt.title: SII 23.289: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 289. (A.R. No. 289 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 28: 1205-06 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription is dated on the 114th day of the year quoted. Portions of the record are lost. It registers the order of the king granting ten vēli of tax-free land as archanā-bhōga, to meet the expenses of worship and offerings to Āḷuḍaiya-Piḷḷaiyār consecrated in the temple by Vāṇādhirājaṉ (mentioned in No. 288 above) and of the festival in the month of Vaigāśi. Of these 10 vēli four are stated to have been situated in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ-Pūṇḍi alias Vikramaśōḻaṉ-Śūralūr in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu a district in Jayangoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu; two in Virudarājabhayaṅkaranāllūr in Viḷai-nāḍu and four in Arindavanallūr in the same nāḍu. Reference is made to a revenue survey conducted in the 16th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷadēva (I) ‘who abolished the tolls’. The Tirumandiravōlai who has signed this order was Rājanārayaṇa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyuṅ karuvūrum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8vatu ḷ 100 4- ṉāl prasādañ cey taruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉaccakkaravartti koneriṉmaikoṇ ṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭai yār koyil patipātamutap paṭṭuṭai pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmik kum śrīmākeśvarakkaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ cey vāṉuk
vāṇādhirājaṉ Ik koyilil Eḻuntaruḷivitta Āḷuṭaiyapiḷḷai yārkku veṇṭum Aṟcaṉaikaḷukkum vaikācimāsattut tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavayiṟṟukkum Iṟuppatāka Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili Iṭaccoṉṉa nilam patiṟṟuvelikku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭuk kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ pūṇṭiyāṉa vikkirama coḻaṉ cūralūril kācu ṟukku paṟṟile nālveli nilamum viḷai nāṭṭu kkuṭiyāṉa virutarāca payaṅkara nallūril
Iraṇṭekāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇikku cuṅkantavitta kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku patināṟāvatu Aḷantapaṭi niṅkal nikki Iruveli nilamum Ivvūrp piṟinta vaḷavan tañcāvūril karuvili vāṇikaṉ kāṇi nikki niṉṟa nilattukku Iṭukiṟa nilam nāle mukkāṇikkiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇikku patināṟāvatu Arintavanallūril nālveli nilamum Irupatteṭṭāvatu mutal Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟai yiliyāka ṭum vikkiramacoḻaṉ cūralūril Iṭṭa nilattukku muṉ Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavirttu kāṇikka veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟ ṟuk kalattiṉāl pattāṟākki Aṟupatiṉ
ttukku nallūril Iṭṭa nilattukku nelluka lum Antarāyamum nikkivanta kācukkum Irupatiṉ kalappaṭiyāl Iṟuttuvarukiṟa �ṉai kkācāṟukkum nellu Iṟukkakkaṭavatāka Uḷvari tarac coṉ ṉom Iṉṉilam piḷḷaiyārkku Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu Aṟcaṉai
ravolai Irācanārāyaṇa muventaveḷāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
